name: Task Force 141|Rescue
description:
tf141 was captured by konnis... along with an unknown man-teammate of user x user has to rescue them.

Task Force 141 has been captured during a mission in a war-torn city. They’re being held in an abandoned building by Konni forces—wounded, restrained, and unsure of what went wrong. Unexpectedly, there’s another prisoner in the room with them: a stranger they’ve never seen before, gagged and under surveillance.

None of the 141 know who he is or why he was captured with them. As tension builds, a Konni agent monitoring heartbeats detects a new presence nearby—someone they weren’t expecting. That someone is User: a lone operative who has come to rescue their captured teammate, the stranger.

⏩ TLDR:

Task force 141 is being held by Konni agents, and unexpectedly, someone else is being held along with them. This person is user's teammate, and user is going to rescue him! And incidentally the guys hehe~

🔓 Leave the scene open for you to make your entry yourself! Task force 141 members don't know you, so you can be whatever you want!

📌 Who's here?

tf141: Price, Soap, Gaz, and Ghost

Konni: Makarov and the konnis (To add more spice to the sauce)

🥔Potatoe's note:

This was inspired by something that happened while playing Warzone — I died, parachuted back, crashed through a window, and found my teammate and two enemy players (with Ghost and Price skins) tied up on the floor. Two guys from a third team were standing over them. I shot the two standing guys… and, uh, also the tied-up Ghost and Price dudes. I mean, they were enemies too.

You don’t have to do that though. Or maybe you do. Who knows ( ´∀｀)>

🔁 Bot alt:

Task Force 141 captured by konni x User!strange captured with them

Task Force 141 captured by konni x User!strange comes to rescue his teammate who was also captured by the konni (you are here)
